declarations.description:
A customizable accordion component used for showing and hiding related groups of content.

The component supports a `<slot>` called 'content' for injecting `<modus-wc-collapse>` elements. See [Collapse](/docs/components-collapse--docs) docs for additional info.
declarations.name: ModusWcAccordion

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the inner div.

events.name: expandedChange
events.description: When a collapse expanded state is changed, this event outputs the relevant index and state

declarations.description:
A customizable alert component used to inform the user about important events.

The component supports `<slot>` elements for injecting custom content and buttons.
declarations.name: ModusWcAlert

attributes.name: alert-description
attributes.description: The description of the alert.

attributes.name: alert-title
attributes.description: The title of the alert.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the outer div element.

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description: Time taken to dismiss the alert in milliseconds

attributes.name: dismissible
attributes.description: Whether the alert has a dismiss button

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: The Modus icon to render.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The variant of the alert.

events.name: dismissClick
events.description: An event that fires when the alert is dismissed

declarations.description:
A customizable autocomplete component used to create searchable text inputs.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting custom content.
declarations.name: ModusWcAutocomplete

members.name: clearInput
members.description: Clear the input value and reset items

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Indicates that the autocomplete should have a border.

attributes.name: custom-blur
attributes.description: Custom blur handler - if provided, overrides default blur behavior

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to host element.

attributes.name: custom-input-change
attributes.description: Custom input change handler - if provided, overrides default search filtering

attributes.name: custom-item-select
attributes.description: Custom item selection handler - if provided, overrides default selection logic

attributes.name: custom-key-down
attributes.description: Custom key down handler - if provided, overrides default keyboard navigation

attributes.name: debounce-ms
attributes.description:
The debounce timeout in milliseconds.
Set to 0 to disable debouncing.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the form control is disabled.

attributes.name: feedback
attributes.description: Feedback state for the input field.

attributes.name: include-clear
attributes.description: Show the clear button within the input field.

attributes.name: include-search
attributes.description: Show the search icon within the input field.

attributes.name: input-id
attributes.description: The ID of the input element.

attributes.name: input-tab-index
attributes.description: Determine the control's relative ordering for sequential focus navigation (typically with the Tab key).

attributes.name: items
attributes.description:
The items to display in the menu.
Creating a new array of items will ensure proper component re-render.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text to display within the label.

attributes.name: leave-menu-open
attributes.description: Whether the menu should remain open after an item is selected.

attributes.name: max-chips
attributes.description: Maximum number of chips to display. When exceeded, shows expand/collapse button. Set to -1 to disable limit.

attributes.name: min-chars
attributes.description: The minimum number of characters required to render the menu.

attributes.name: min-input-width
attributes.description: Minimum width for the text input in pixels. When chips would make input smaller, container height increases instead.

attributes.name: multi-select
attributes.description: Whether the input allows multiple items to be selected.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name of the form control. Submitted with the form as part of a name/value pair.

attributes.name: no-results
attributes.default: { ariaLabel: 'No results found', label: 'No results found', subLabel: 'Check spelling or try a different keyword', }
attributes.description: The content to display when no results are found.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Text that appears in the form control when it has no value set.

attributes.name: read-only
attributes.description: Whether the value is editable.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: A value is required for the form to be submittable.

attributes.name: show-menu-on-focus
attributes.description: Whether to show the menu whenever the input has focus, regardless of input value.

attributes.name: show-spinner
attributes.description: A spinner that appears when set to true

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the autocomplete (input and menu).

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The value of the control.

events.name: chipRemove
events.description: Event emitted when a selected item chip is removed.

events.name: chipsExpansionChange
events.description: Event emitted when chips expansion state changes.

events.name: clearClick
events.description: Event emitted when the clear button is clicked.

events.name: inputBlur
events.description: Event emitted when the input loses focus.

events.name: inputChange
events.description:
Event emitted when the input value changes.
This event is debounced based on the debounceMs prop.

events.name: inputFocus
events.description: Event emitted when the input gains focus.

events.name: itemSelect
events.description: Event emitted when a menu item is selected.

declarations.description:
A customizable avatar component used to create avatars with different images or user initials.
When no image is provided, the component can display initials (up to 3 characters) from the initials prop.
The component will extract the first letter of each word in the initials string.
declarations.name: ModusWcAvatar

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: The image alt attribute for accessibility.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the inner div.

attributes.name: img-src
attributes.description: The location of the image.

attributes.name: initials
attributes.description: The initials to display when no image is provided.

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: The shape of the avatar.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the avatar.

declarations.description:
A customizable badge component used to create badges with different sizes, types, and colors.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting content within the badge.
declarations.name: ModusWcBadge

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: The color variant of the badge.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the span element.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the badge.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The variant of the badge.

declarations.description: A customizable breadcrumbs component used to help users navigate through a website.
declarations.name: ModusWcBreadcrumbs

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the inner div.

attributes.name: items
attributes.description: The breadcrumbs to render.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the breadcrumbs.

events.name: breadcrumbClick
events.description: Event emitted when a breadcrumb is clicked.

declarations.description:
A customizable buttongroup component that groups multiple Modus buttons together.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting content within the buttongroup.
declarations.name: ModusWcButtonGroup

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Color to apply to all buttons within the button group

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables all buttons within the button group

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Orientation of the button group: horizontal or vertical

attributes.name: selection-type
attributes.description: Selection type for button group

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Style variant to apply to all buttons within the button group

events.name: buttonGroupClick
events.description: Event emitted when any button in the group is clicked

events.name: buttonSelectionChange
events.description: Event emitted when button selection changes

declarations.description:
A customizable button component used to create buttons with different sizes, variants, and types.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting content within the button, similar to a native HTML button.
declarations.name: ModusWcButton

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: The color variant of the button.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the button element.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: If true, the button will be disabled.

attributes.name: full-width
attributes.description: If true, the button will take the full width of its container.

attributes.name: pressed
attributes.description: If true, the button will be in a pressed state (for toggle buttons).

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: The shape of the button.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the button.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The type of the button.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The variant of the button.

events.name: buttonClick
events.description: Event emitted when the button is clicked or activated via keyboard.

declarations.description:
A customizable card component used to group and display content in a way that is easily readable.

This component supports multiple `<slot>` elements including 'header' for images or custom content, 'title', 'subtitle', a default slot for main content, 'actions' for buttons or interactive elements, and 'footer'.
declarations.name: ModusWcCard

attributes.name: background-figure
attributes.description: Makes any \<figure> in the 'header' slot cover the background

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Adds a hard border to the card

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description: Determines how the card is laid out

attributes.name: padding
attributes.description: Determines the interior padding size

declarations.description: A customizable checkbox component
declarations.name: ModusWcCheckbox

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the inner div.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: The disabled state of the checkbox.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: The indeterminate state of the checkbox.

attributes.name: input-id
attributes.description: The ID of the input element.

attributes.name: input-tab-index
attributes.description: The tabindex of the input.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text to display within the label.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name of the form control. Submitted with the form as part of a name/value pair.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: A value is required for the form to be submittable.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the input.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The value of the checkbox.

events.name: inputBlur
events.description: Emitted when the input loses focus.

events.name: inputChange
events.description: Emitted when the input value changes.

events.name: inputFocus
events.description: Emitted when the input gains focus.

declarations.description:
A customizable chip component used to display information in a compact area

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting custom content such as avatar and icons.
declarations.name: ModusWcChip

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Active state of chip.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the inner div.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the chip is disabled.

attributes.name: has-error
attributes.description: Whether the chip has an error.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The label to display in the chip.

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: The shape of the chip: 'rectangle' (default) or 'circle'.

attributes.name: show-remove
attributes.description: Whether to show the close icon on right side of the chip.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the chip.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The variant of the chip.

events.name: chipClick
events.description: Event emitted when the chip is clicked or activated via keyboard.

events.name: chipRemove
events.description: Event emitted when the close chip icon button is clicked.

declarations.description:
A customizable collapse component used for showing and hiding content.

The component supports a 'header' and 'content' `<slot>` for injecting custom HTML.
declarations.name: ModusWcCollapse

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Indicates that the component should have a border.

attributes.name: collapse-id
attributes.description: A unique identifier used to set the id attributes of various elements.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the outer div.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: Controls whether the collapse is expanded or not.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description:
Configuration options for rendering the pre-laid out collapse component.
Do not set this prop if you intend to use the 'header' slot.

events.name: expandedChange
events.description: Event emitted when the expanded prop is internally changed.

declarations.description: A customizable content tree component used to display hierarchical data in a tree structure.
declarations.name: ModusWcContentTree

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the component.

attributes.name: include-actions
attributes.description: If true, displays the action buttons (expand/collapse all, etc.).

attributes.name: include-search
attributes.description: If true, displays the search input to filter tree items.

attributes.name: search-placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text for the search input.

declarations.description:
ModusWcTreeActions is a component that renders action buttons for tree items in the Modus content tree.
It supports displaying a primary action and grouping additional actions in a dropdown menu if there are more than two actions.
declarations.name: ModusWcTreeActions

attributes.name: actions
attributes.description: List of actions to display

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the action buttons and icons.

events.name: dropdownOpened
events.description: Event emitted when a dropdown is opened

events.name: treeActionClick
events.description: Event emitted when an action is clicked

declarations.description: A tree item component that represents a single node in a hierarchical tree structure.
declarations.name: ModusWcTreeItem

members.name: collapseSubTree
members.description: Public method to collapse the subtree if it's expanded

members.name: expandSubTree
members.description: Public method to expand the subtree if it's collapsed

members.name: isExpanded
members.description: Internal state to track if subtree is expanded

members.name: isIndeterminate
members.description: Internal state to track if checkbox is in indeterminate state

attributes.name: checkbox
attributes.description: If true, renders a checkbox at the start of the tree item.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the li element.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: The disabled state of the tree item.

attributes.name: has-subtree
attributes.description: Whether this tree item has a collapsible subtree. When true, the item will show a caret and handle toggle behavior.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text label displayed for the tree item.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: The selected state of the tree item.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the tree item icons and actions.

attributes.name: tree-item-actions
attributes.description: Actions to display for this tree item.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The unique identifying value of the tree item.

events.name: itemSelect
events.description: Event emitted when a tree item is selected.

events.name: selectionsChange
events.description: Event emitted when checkbox selection changes in multi-select mode.

declarations.description:
A wrapper component that provides the ul element for tree items.
This component uses the modus-wc-menu structure to wrap tree items in a proper list structure.
declarations.name: ModusWcTreeView

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the ul element.

attributes.name: is-sub-list
attributes.description: Indicates that this list is a nested sublist.

declarations.description:
A customizable date picker component used to create date inputs.

Adheres to WCAG 2.2 standards.
declarations.name: ModusWcDate

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Indicates that the input should have a border.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the input.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the form control is disabled.

attributes.name: feedback
attributes.description: Feedback to render below the input.

attributes.name: format
attributes.description: The date format for display and input.

attributes.name: input-id
attributes.description: The ID of the input element.

attributes.name: input-tab-index
attributes.description: Determine the control's relative ordering for sequential focus navigation (typically with the Tab key).

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text to display within the label.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum date value.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Minimum date value.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name of the form control. Submitted with the form as part of a name/value pair.

attributes.name: read-only
attributes.description: Whether the value is editable.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: A value is required or must be checked for the form to be submittable.

attributes.name: show-week-numbers
attributes.description: Displays ISO 8601 week numbers in the calendar.Week numbers are calculated with Monday as the first day of the week.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the input.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The value of the control.

attributes.name: week-start-day
attributes.description: The first day of the week for the calendar display

events.name: calendarMonthChange
events.description: Event emitted when the calendar month selection changes.

events.name: calendarYearChange
events.description: Event emitted when the calendar year selection changes.

events.name: inputBlur
events.description: Event emitted when the input loses focus.

events.name: inputChange
events.description: Event emitted when the input value changes.

events.name: inputFocus
events.description: Event emitted when the input gains focus.

declarations.description: A customizable divider component used to separate content horizontally or vertically
declarations.name: ModusWcDivider

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: The color of the divider line.

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: The content to display in the divider.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the divider element.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: The orientation of the divider. This is in reference to how content will be rendered around the divider.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: The position of the divider.

attributes.name: responsive
attributes.description: Whether the divider is responsive or not.

declarations.description:
A customizable dropdown menu component used to render a button and toggleable menu.

The component supports a 'button' and 'menu' `<slot>` for injecting custom HTML content.
declarations.name: ModusWcDropdownMenu

attributes.name: button-aria-label
attributes.description: The aria-label for the dropdown button.

attributes.name: button-color
attributes.description: The color variant of the button.

attributes.name: button-size
attributes.description: The size of the button.

attributes.name: button-variant
attributes.description: The variant of the button.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the host element.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: If true, the button will be disabled.

attributes.name: menu-bordered
attributes.description: Indicates that the menu should have a border.

attributes.name: menu-offset
attributes.description: Distance between the button and menu in pixels.

attributes.name: menu-placement
attributes.description: The placement of the menu relative to the button.

attributes.name: menu-size
attributes.description: The size of the menu.

attributes.name: menu-visible
attributes.description: Indicates that the menu is visible.

events.name: menuVisibilityChange
events.description: Event emitted when the menuVisible prop changes.

declarations.description:
File dropzone component that allows users to drag and drop files for upload.

The component supports a `<slot>` called 'dropzone' for adding custom content such as progress indicators or additional instructions within the dropzone area.
declarations.name: ModusWcFileDropzone

members.name: reset
members.description: Reset the dropzone to its initial state, clearing all error and success states

attributes.name: accept-file-types
attributes.description: Accepted file types (e.g. '.jpg,.png' or 'image/*')

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the file dropzone element

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disable the file input

attributes.name: file-dragged-over-instructions
attributes.description: Custom instructions shown when files are dragged over the dropzone

attributes.name: include-state-icon
attributes.description: Include state icon (upload, success, error)

attributes.name: instructions
attributes.description: Custom instructions shown as the default dropzone message

attributes.name: invalid-file-type-message
attributes.description: Custom error message displayed when an invalid file type is selected

attributes.name: max-file-count
attributes.description: Maximum number of files allowed, will show error if exceeded

attributes.name: max-file-name-length
attributes.description: Maximum allowed length of filename, will show error if exceeded

attributes.name: max-total-file-size-bytes
attributes.description: Maximum total file size in bytes allowed, will show error if exceeded

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Allow multiple file selection

attributes.name: success-message
attributes.description: Success message displayed when files are uploaded successfully

events.name: fileSelect
events.description: Event emitted when files are selected

declarations.description: A draggable handle component for resizing adjacent elements
declarations.name: ModusWcHandle

attributes.name: button-color
attributes.description: The color of the button.

attributes.name: button-size
attributes.description: The size of the button.

attributes.name: button-variant
attributes.description: The variant of the button.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the handle element.

attributes.name: default-split
attributes.description: The initial split percentage for the left/top panel (1-100). The right/bottom panel gets the remaining percentage.

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: The density/spacing of the handle container (compact: 8px, comfortable: 12px, relaxed: 16px).

attributes.name: left-target
attributes.description: The left target element to resize (CSS selector or HTMLElement)

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: The orientation of the handle.

attributes.name: right-target
attributes.description: The right target element to resize (CSS selector or HTMLElement)

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the handle.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: The type of handle to display.

declarations.description: A customizable icon component used to render Modus icons. This component requires Modus icons to be installed in the host application. See [Modus Icon Usage](/docs/documentation-modus-icon-usage--docs) for steps.
declarations.name: ModusWcIcon

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the i element.

attributes.name: decorative
attributes.description: Indicates that the icon is decorative. When true, sets aria-hidden to hide the icon from screen readers.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The icon name, should match the CSS class in the icon font.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The icon size, can be "sm", "md", "lg" (a custom size can be specified in CSS). This adjusts the font size for the icon.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The icon variant, can be "outlined" or "solid".

declarations.description: A customizable feedback component used to provide additional context related to form input interactions. To use a custom icon, this component requires Modus icons to be installed in the host application. See [Modus Icon Usage](/docs/documentation-modus-icon-usage--docs) for steps.
declarations.name: ModusWcInputFeedback

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the outer div element.

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: The Modus icon to use instead of the pre-defined icons.

attributes.name: level
attributes.description: The level informs which icon and color that will be rendered.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: The message.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the feedback component.

declarations.description:
A customizable input label component.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting additional custom content inside the label, such as icons or formatted text.
declarations.name: ModusWcInputLabel

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Additional classes for custom styling.

attributes.name: for-id
attributes.description: The `for` attribute of the label, matching the `id` of the associated input.

attributes.name: label-text
attributes.description: The text to display within the label.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Whether the label indicates a required field.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the label.

attributes.name: sub-label-text
attributes.description: The text rendered beneath the label.

declarations.description: A customizable loader component used to indicate the loading of content
declarations.name: ModusWcLoader

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: The color of the loader.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the loader element.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the loader.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The variant of the loader.

declarations.description:
A component for displaying Trimble product logos with support for both fixed and scalable sizing.
Provides consistent branding across applications with various product logo options.
declarations.name: ModusWcLogo

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: The alt text for accessibility. If not provided, defaults to the logo name.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the logo container.

attributes.name: emblem
attributes.description: Show emblem version (icon only) instead of full logo

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The name of the logo to display. Accepts values like 'trimble', 'viewpoint_field_view', etc.

declarations.description:
A customizable menu item component used to display the item portion of a menu.

This component supports a 'start-icon' `<slot>` that allows for custom icons to be placed at the beginning of the item.
declarations.name: ModusWcMenuItem

members.name: collapseSubmenu
members.description: Public method to collapse the submenu if it's expanded

members.name: isExpanded
members.description: Internal state to track if submenu is expanded

attributes.name: checkbox
attributes.description: If true, renders a checkbox at the start of the menu item.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the li element.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: The disabled state of the menu item.

attributes.name: focused
attributes.description: The focused state of the menu item.

attributes.name: has-submenu
attributes.description: Whether this menu item has a collapsible submenu. When true, the item will show a caret and handle toggle behavior.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text rendered in the menu item.

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: The selected state of the menu item.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the menu item.

attributes.name: start-icon
attributes.description: The modus icon name to render on the start of the menu item.

attributes.name: sub-label
attributes.description: The text rendered beneath the label.

attributes.name: tooltip-content
attributes.description: The tooltip text to display when hovering over the menu item.

attributes.name: tooltip-position
attributes.description: The position of the tooltip relative to the menu item.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The unique identifying value of the menu item.

events.name: itemSelect
events.description: Event emitted when a menu item is selected.

declarations.description:
A customizable menu component used to display a list of li elements vertically or horizontally.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting custom li elements inside the ul element.
declarations.name: ModusWcMenu

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Indicates that the menu should have a border.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the ul element.

attributes.name: is-sub-menu
attributes.description: Indicates that this menu is a submenu (dropdown).

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: The orientation of the menu.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the menu.

events.name: menuFocusout
events.description: Event emitted when the menu loses focus.

declarations.description:
A customizable modal component used to display content in a dialog.

This component supports 'header', 'content', and 'footer' `<slot>` elements for inserting custom HTML.
declarations.name: ModusWcModal

attributes.name: backdrop
attributes.description:
The modal's backdrop.
Specify 'static' for a backdrop that doesn't close the modal when clicked outside the modal content.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply

attributes.name: fullscreen
attributes.description: Specifies whether the modal should be displayed full-screen

attributes.name: modal-id
attributes.description: The ID of the inner dialog element

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: Specifies the position of the modal

attributes.name: show-close
attributes.description: Specifies whether to show the close icon button at the top right of modal

attributes.name: show-fullscreen-toggle
attributes.description: Specifies whether to show the fullscreen toggle icon button

declarations.description:
A customizable navbar component used for top level navigation of all Trimble applications.

The component supports a 'main-menu', 'notifications', and 'apps' <slot> for injecting custom HTML menus. It also supports a 'start', 'center', and 'end' `<slot>` for injecting additional custom HTML.
declarations.name: ModusWcNavbar

attributes.name: apps-menu-open
attributes.description: The open state of the apps menu.

attributes.name: condensed
attributes.description: Applies condensed layout and styling.

declarations.description:
A customizable panel component used to organize content in a structured layout.

This component provides 'header', 'body', and 'footer' `<slot>` elements for inserting custom HTML.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Width of the panel in pixels.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: The progress component's maximum value.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The value of the progress component.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The variant of the progress component.

declarations.description:
A customizable side navigation component for organizing primary navigation and content areas in an application.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting custom content inside the side navigation panel.

attributes.description: Whether the side navigation is expanded.

attributes.name: max-width
attributes.description: Maximum width of the side navigation panel in an expanded state.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Mode to make side navigation either overlay or push the content for the selector specified in targetContent

attributes.name: target-content
attributes.description: (optional) Specify the selector for the page's content for which paddings and margins will be set by side navigation based on the mode.

events.name: expandedChange
events.description: Event emitted when the expanded state changes (expanded/collapsed).

type.text: { rowIndex: number; colId: string } | null | undefined

attributes.name: caption
attributes.description: Accessibility caption for the table (visually hidden but available to screen readers).

attributes.name: columns
attributes.description: An array of column definitions.

attributes.name: current-page
attributes.description: The current page number in pagination (1-based index).

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the inner div.

attributes.name: data
attributes.description: An array of data objects.

attributes.name: density
attributes.description: The density of the table, used to save space or increase readability.

attributes.name: editable
attributes.description: Enable cell editing. Either a boolean (all rows) or a predicate per row.

attributes.name: hover
attributes.description: Enable hover effect on table rows.

attributes.name: page-size-options
attributes.description: Available options for the number of rows per page.

attributes.name: paginated
attributes.description: Enable pagination for the table.

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Row selection mode: 'none' for no selection, 'single' for single row, 'multi' for multiple rows.

attributes.name: selected-row-ids
attributes.description: Array of selected row IDs. Used for controlled selection state.

attributes.name: show-page-size-selector
attributes.description: Show/hide the page size selector in pagination.

attributes.name: sortable
attributes.description: Enable sorting functionality for sortable columns.

attributes.name: zebra
attributes.description: Zebra striped tables differentiate rows by styling them in an alternating fashion.

events.name: cellEditCommit
events.description: Emits when cell editing is committed with the new value.

events.name: cellEditStart
events.description: Emits when cell editing starts.

events.name: paginationChange
events.description: Emits when pagination changes with the new pagination state.

events.name: rowClick
events.description: Emits when a row is clicked.

events.name: rowSelectionChange
events.description: Emits when row selection changes with the selected rows and their IDs.

events.name: sortChange
events.description: Emits when sorting changes with the new sorting state.

attributes.name: tab-style
attributes.description: Additional styling for the tabs.

attributes.name: tabs
attributes.description: The tabs to display.

events.description: When a tab is switched to, this event outputs the relevant indices

declarations.description:
A customizable input component used to create text inputs with types.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting additional custom content inside the input, such as icons or formatted text.
declarations.name: ModusWcTextInput

attributes.name: auto-capitalize
attributes.description: Controls automatic capitalization in inputted text.

attributes.name: auto-complete
attributes.description: Hint for form autofill feature.

attributes.name: auto-correct
attributes.description: Controls automatic correction in inputted text. Support by browser varies.

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Indicates that the input should have a border.

attributes.name: clear-aria-label
attributes.description: Aria label for the clear icon button.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the input.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the form control is disabled.

attributes.name: enterkeyhint
attributes.description: A hint to the browser for which enter key to display.

attributes.name: feedback
attributes.description: Feedback to render below the input.

attributes.name: include-clear
attributes.description: Show the clear button within the input field.

attributes.name: include-search
attributes.description: Show the search icon within the input field.

attributes.name: input-id
attributes.description: The ID of the input element.

attributes.name: input-tab-index
attributes.description: Determine the control's relative ordering for sequential focus navigation (typically with the Tab key).

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text to display within the label.

attributes.name: max-length
attributes.description: Maximum length (number of characters) of value.

attributes.name: min-length
attributes.description: Minimum length (number of characters) of value.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name of the form control. Submitted with the form as part of a name/value pair.

attributes.name: pattern
attributes.description: Pattern the value must match to be valid

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Text that appears in the form control when it has no value set.

attributes.name: read-only
attributes.description: Whether the value is editable.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: A value is required for the form to be submittable.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the input.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Type of form control.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The value of the control.

events.name: clearClick
events.description: Event emitted when the clear button is clicked.

events.name: inputBlur
events.description: Event emitted when the input loses focus.

events.name: inputChange
events.description: Event emitted when the input value changes.

events.name: inputFocus
events.description: Event emitted when the input gains focus.

declarations.description:
A theme switcher component used to toggle the application theme and/or mode.

Allows consumers to set the initial theme (Modus Classic, Modus Modern, etc.) and end-users to toggle modes (Light, Dark).
declarations.name: ModusWcThemeSwitcher

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the theme switcher element.

events.name: themeChange
events.description: An event that fires when the theme is changed.

declarations.description: A customizable input component used to create time inputs.
declarations.name: ModusWcTimeInput

attributes.name: auto-complete
attributes.description: Hint for form autofill feature.

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Indicates that the input should have a border.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the input.

attributes.name: datalist-id
attributes.description:
ID of a `<datalist>` element that contains pre-defined time options.
The value must be the ID of a `<datalist>` element in the same document.

attributes.name: datalist-options
attributes.description: The options to display in the time input dropdown. Options must be in `HH:mm` or `HH:mm:ss` format.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the form control is disabled.

attributes.name: feedback
attributes.description: Feedback to render below the input.

attributes.name: input-id
attributes.description: The ID of the input element.

attributes.name: input-tab-index
attributes.description: Determine the control's relative ordering for sequential focus navigation (typically with the Tab key).

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text to display within the label.

attributes.name: max
attributes.description: Maximum value. Format: `HH:mm`, `HH:mm:ss`.

attributes.name: min
attributes.description: Minimum value. Format: `HH:mm`, `HH:mm:ss.`

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name of the form control. Submitted with the form as part of a name/value pair.

attributes.name: read-only
attributes.description: Whether the value is editable.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: A value is required for the form to be submittable.

attributes.name: show-seconds
attributes.description:
Displays the time input format as `HH:mm:ss` if `true`.
Internally sets the `step` to 1 second.
If a `step` value is provided, it will override this attribute.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the input.

attributes.name: step
attributes.description:
Specifies the granularity that the `value` must adhere to.
Value of step given in seconds. Default value is 60 seconds.
Overrides the `seconds` attribute if both are provided.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
The value of the time input.
Always in 24-hour format that includes leading zeros:
`HH:mm` or `HH:mm:ss`, regardless of input format which is likely
to be selected based on user's locale (or by the user agent).
If time includes seconds the format is always `HH:mm:ss`.

events.name: inputBlur
events.description: Event emitted when the input loses focus.

events.name: inputChange
events.description: Event emitted when the input value changes.

events.name: inputFocus
events.description: Event emitted when the input gains focus.

declarations.description:
A customizable toast component used to stack elements, positioned on the corner of a page.

The component supports a `<slot>` for injecting additional custom content inside the toast.
declarations.name: ModusWcToast

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Additional classes for custom styling.

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description: Time taken to dismiss the toast in milliseconds

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: The position of the toast in the parent container.

declarations.description:
A customizable toolbar component used to organize content across the entire page.

This component provides 'start', 'center', and 'end' `<slot>` elements for inserting custom HTML.
declarations.name: ModusWcToolbar

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the outer div.

declarations.description:
A customizable tooltip component used to create tooltips with different content.

The tooltip can be dismissed by pressing the Escape key when hovering over it.
When forceOpen is enabled, the tooltip will remain open and can only be closed by setting forceOpen to false.
declarations.name: ModusWcTooltip

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: The text content of the tooltip.

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the inner div.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables displaying the tooltip on hover

attributes.name: force-open
attributes.description: Use this attribute to force the tooltip to remain open.

attributes.name: position
attributes.description: The position that the tooltip will render in relation to the element.

attributes.name: tooltip-id
attributes.description: The ID of the tooltip element, useful for setting the "aria-describedby" attribute of related elements.

events.name: dismissEscape
events.description: An event that fires when the tooltip is dismissed via Escape key

declarations.description:
A customizable typography component used to render text with different sizes, hierarchy, and weights.

Note:
- When using heading elements (h1-h6), the default heading CSS styling can be accessed without modifying
the default size (size="md") and weight (weight="normal") properties. Default styling can be overridden by
providing your own custom values for the size or weight properties from the available options.


- If both slot content and `label` are provided, only the slot content will be rendered
- Use the `label` prop when you need to dynamically update the text.
declarations.name: ModusWCTypography

attributes.name: custom-class
attributes.description: Custom CSS class to apply to the typography element.

attributes.name: hierarchy
attributes.description: The hierarchy of the typography component.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: The text label to display.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the font.

attributes.name: weight
attributes.description: The weight of the text.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: The panel is expanded or closed

attributes.name: push-content
attributes.description: Determines if the panel pushes content or displays an overlay.

attributes.name: target-element
attributes.description: Target element reference to push content when panel opens

events.name: panelClosed
events.description: An event that fires when the panel is closed.

events.name: panelOpened
events.description: An event that fires when the panel is opened.
